mapper.sql: id, num, title, handle_users, handle_user, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, project_id, template_id, platform, `status`, tags, platform_bug_id, feishu_story_id, defect_type, defect_reason, app_id, affected_app_ids, discovery_phase, business_line, discovery_difficulty, reopen_count, discoverer, actual_time, delete_user, delete_time, deleted, pos
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from bug
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into bug (id, num, title, handle_users, handle_user, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, project_id, template_id, platform, `status`, tags, platform_bug_id, feishu_story_id, defect_type, defect_reason, app_id, affected_app_ids, discovery_phase, business_line, discovery_difficulty, reopen_count, discoverer, actual_time, delete_user, delete_time, deleted, pos) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler}, #{platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{pos,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into bug
id,
num,
title,
handle_users,
handle_user,
create_user,
create_time,
update_user,
update_time,
project_id,
template_id,
platform,
`status`,
tags,
platform_bug_id,
feishu_story_id,
defect_type,
defect_reason,
app_id,
affected_app_ids,
discovery_phase,
business_line,
discovery_difficulty,
reopen_count,
discoverer,
actual_time,
delete_user,
delete_time,
deleted,
pos,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{pos,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update bug
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_users = #{record.handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_user = #{record.handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
project_id = #{record.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
template_id = #{record.templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
platform = #{record.platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tags = #{record.tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler},
platform_bug_id = #{record.platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feishu_story_id = #{record.feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
defect_type = #{record.defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
defect_reason = #{record.defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_id = #{record.appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
affected_app_ids = #{record.affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
discovery_phase = #{record.discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
business_line = #{record.businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
discovery_difficulty = #{record.discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reopen_count = #{record.reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discoverer = #{record.discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
actual_time = #{record.actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_user = #{record.deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delete_time = #{record.deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
pos = #{record.pos,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update bug set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_users = #{record.handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_user = #{record.handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, project_id = #{record.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, template_id = #{record.templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, platform = #{record.platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tags = #{record.tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler}, platform_bug_id = #{record.platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feishu_story_id = #{record.feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_type = #{record.defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_reason = #{record.defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_id = #{record.appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, affected_app_ids = #{record.affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, discovery_phase = #{record.discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, business_line = #{record.businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, discovery_difficulty = #{record.discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reopen_count = #{record.reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discoverer = #{record.discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, actual_time = #{record.actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_user = #{record.deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delete_time = #{record.deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, pos = #{record.pos,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update bug
num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_users = #{handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_user = #{handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
template_id = #{templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
platform = #{platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tags = #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler},
platform_bug_id = #{platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
feishu_story_id = #{feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
defect_type = #{defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
defect_reason = #{defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
affected_app_ids = #{affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
discovery_phase = #{discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
business_line = #{businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
discovery_difficulty = #{discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reopen_count = #{reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discoverer = #{discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
actual_time = #{actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_user = #{deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
pos = #{pos,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update bug set num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_users = #{handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_user = #{handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, project_id = #{projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, template_id = #{templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, platform = #{platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tags = #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler}, platform_bug_id = #{platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, feishu_story_id = #{feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_type = #{defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, defect_reason = #{defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, app_id = #{appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, affected_app_ids = #{affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, discovery_phase = #{discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, business_line = #{businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, discovery_difficulty = #{discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reopen_count = #{reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discoverer = #{discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, actual_time = #{actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_user = #{deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, pos = #{pos,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into bug (id, num, title, handle_users, handle_user, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, project_id, template_id, platform, `status`, tags, platform_bug_id, feishu_story_id, defect_type, defect_reason, app_id, affected_app_ids, discovery_phase, business_line, discovery_difficulty, reopen_count, discoverer, actual_time, delete_user, delete_time, deleted, pos) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.handleUsers,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.handleUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.projectId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.templateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.platform,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR,typeHandler=io.vanguard.testops.handler.ListTypeHandler}, #{item.platformBugId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.feishuStoryId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.defectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.defectReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.affectedAppIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.discoveryPhase,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.businessLine,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.discoveryDifficulty,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.reopenCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.discoverer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.actualTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.deleteUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.deleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.pos,jdbcType=BIGINT})
